mapper.sql: select resource_id, resource_name, resource_type, course_id, chapter_id, node_id, sort_no, uploader_id, author_name, publisher_name, target_user_type, file_url, cover_url, content_text, summary, audit_status, view_count, download_count, favorite_count, allow_comment, allow_rating, allow_share, quality_score, avg_rating, rating_count, comment_count, share_count, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sc_resource
mapper.insert: insert into sc_resource(resource_name, resource_type, course_id, chapter_id, node_id, sort_no, uploader_id, author_name, publisher_name, target_user_type, file_url, cover_url, content_text, summary, audit_status, view_count, download_count, favorite_count, allow_comment, allow_rating, allow_share, quality_score, avg_rating, rating_count, comment_count, share_count, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{resourceName}, #{resourceType}, #{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{nodeId}, #{sortNo}, #{uploaderId}, #{authorName}, #{publisherName}, #{targetUserType}, #{fileUrl}, #{coverUrl}, #{contentText}, #{summary}, #{auditStatus}, #{viewCount}, #{downloadCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{allowComment}, #{allowRating}, #{allowShare}, #{qualityScore}, #{avgRating}, #{ratingCount}, #{commentCount}, #{shareCount}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_resource resource_name = #{resourceName}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, course_id = #{courseId}, chapter_id = #{chapterId}, node_id = #{nodeId}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, uploader_id = #{uploaderId}, author_name = #{authorName}, publisher_name = #{publisherName}, target_user_type = #{targetUserType}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, content_text = #{contentText}, summary = #{summary}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, view_count = #{viewCount}, download_count = #{downloadCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, allow_comment = #{allowComment}, allow_rating = #{allowRating}, allow_share = #{allowShare}, quality_score = #{qualityScore}, avg_rating = #{avgRating}, rating_count = #{ratingCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, share_count = #{shareCount}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = sysdate() where resource_id = #{resourceId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_resource where resource_id in #{resourceId}
mapper.update: update sc_resource set view_count = ifnull(view_count, 0) + 1 where resource_id = #{resourceId}
update sc_resource set download_count = ifnull(download_count, 0) + 1 where resource_id = #{resourceId}
update sc_resource set favorite_count = ifnull(favorite_count, 0) + 1 where resource_id = #{resourceId}
update sc_resource set share_count = ifnull(share_count, 0) + 1 where resource_id = #{resourceId}
